meta.name: archon

skills.name: ui-ux-designer
skills.description: Full-spectrum UI/UX designer — interface design, interaction design, user experience, and design system expertise.

skills.name: ux-interaction-design

skills.name: ux-research

skills.name: wireframing

skills.name: writing-skills
skills.description: Create, edit, and verify Archon skills — best practices for skill authoring and quality assurance.

agents.name: Context Curator
agents.persona: Universal context curator who distills phase artifacts into optimized, role-aware context briefs for pipeline handoffs. Ensures clean context flows between agents.
agents.philosophy: Clean context in, clean work out. An agent that starts with noise produces noise.

agents.name: Debugger
agents.persona: Systematic root cause analyst who follows a rigorous four-phase framework: Symptom → Context → Hypotheses → Solution. Never jumps to fixes.
agents.philosophy: A fix without understanding is just tomorrow's bug. Investigation before implementation.

agents.name: Implementer
agents.persona: Disciplined developer executing specs with TDD precision, building section-by-section with continuous verification. The spec is the contract.
agents.philosophy: The spec is the contract. My job is to honor that contract exactly — nothing more, nothing less.

agents.name: QA Master
agents.persona: Comprehensive QA engineer ensuring quality through E2E testing, test planning, and systematic validation across the full testing pyramid.
agents.philosophy: Quality is not an act, it is a habit. Test early, test often, test thoroughly.

agents.name: Reviewer
agents.persona: Meticulous auditor verifying implementation compliance against specifications with objective, evidence-based verification. Read-only — never modifies code.
agents.philosophy: I am the guardian between implementation and deployment. My job is to catch gaps before they reach production.

agents.name: Spec Writer
agents.persona: Requirements engineer transforming ambiguous ideas into crystal-clear, implementable specifications with 100% testable acceptance criteria.
agents.philosophy: A perfect specification makes implementation trivial. An ambiguous specification makes implementation impossible.

agents.name: UI Designer
agents.persona: Visual design specialist creating beautiful, production-grade interfaces with design tokens, component libraries, and accessible responsive implementations.
agents.philosophy: Design is not just what it looks like. Design is how it works. But it better look damn good while doing it.

agents.name: UX Researcher
agents.persona: User-centered researcher uncovering user needs through personas, journey mapping, and competitive analysis. Never assumes — validates with data.
agents.philosophy: Design without research is just art. Research transforms guesses into validated user needs.

pipelines.name: SDD Pipeline
pipelines.description: End-to-end Spec-Driven Development: plan → specification → context curation → implementation → review

steps.name: Specify
steps.description: Transform user's plan into comprehensive specification

steps.name: Curate Context
steps.description: Distill spec into optimized context for implementer

steps.name: Implement
steps.description: Build the feature with TDD, section by section

steps.name: Curate for Review
steps.description: Prepare review context with code + spec mapping

steps.name: Review
steps.description: Verify compliance against specification

pipelines.name: UX Pipeline
pipelines.description: Full UX design lifecycle: research → wireframes → visual design → review → handoff

steps.name: Research
steps.description: Create personas, journey maps, competitive analysis

steps.name: Curate for Wireframe
steps.description: Distill research insights for wireframing

steps.name: Wireframe
steps.description: Create low-fidelity wireframes from research

steps.name: Curate for Visual
steps.description: Prepare design context with wireframes + research

steps.name: Visual Design
steps.description: Create high-fidelity designs with design tokens

steps.name: Review
steps.description: Design review against wireframes and research

steps.name: Handoff
steps.description: Create implementation-ready design handoff

pipelines.name: Debug Pipeline
pipelines.description: Systematic bug investigation → root cause analysis → fix → test → review

steps.name: Investigate
steps.description: Systematic root cause analysis and hypothesis testing

steps.name: Curate for Fix
steps.description: Distill root cause and affected files for fix

steps.name: Fix
steps.description: Implement targeted fix based on root cause

steps.name: Test
steps.description: Verify fix and run regression tests

steps.name: Review
steps.description: Code review of fix against root cause analysis

pipelines.name: Skill Factory
pipelines.description: Guided skill creation: design prompt → specify → implement → validate → review

steps.name: Design Prompt
steps.description: Design optimized skill prompt structure

steps.name: Specify
steps.description: Create detailed skill specification

steps.name: Curate Context
steps.description: Prepare Archon format requirements

steps.name: Implement
steps.description: Build complete skill directory

steps.name: Validate
steps.description: Validate manifest, structure, trigger uniqueness

steps.name: Review
steps.description: Final quality review of skill

pipelines.name: Full Product
pipelines.description: Complete product development: UX design → specification → implementation → testing → review

steps.name: UX Design
steps.description: Complete UX package: research, wireframes, designs

steps.name: Curate for Spec
steps.description: Distill design decisions for specification

steps.name: Specify
steps.description: Create comprehensive technical specification

steps.name: Curate for Build
steps.description: Chunk spec by story with design references

steps.name: Implement
steps.description: Build the product from specification

steps.name: Curate for Review
steps.description: Prepare review context with full artifacts

steps.name: Review
steps.description: Verify implementation against spec

steps.name: Test
steps.description: E2E, accessibility, and UX compliance tests

bundles.name: Django Kit
bundles.description: Complete Django development toolkit — ORM patterns, REST APIs, authentication, and framework best practices.

bundles.name: Godot Kit
bundles.description: Full Godot 4 game development suite — GDScript mastery, patterns, particles, debugging, and best practices.

bundles.name: UX Design Kit
bundles.description: Complete UX/UI design pipeline — research, wireframing, visual design, interaction patterns, and testing.

bundles.name: Web Dev Kit
bundles.description: Modern web development stack — React, Next.js, frontend design, backend patterns, and Vercel optimization.

bundles.name: SDD Kit
bundles.description: Spec-Driven Development complete workflow — write specs, implement with TDD, review for compliance, and manage handoffs.

bundles.name: Testing Kit
bundles.description: Comprehensive testing toolkit — E2E patterns, test planning, webapp automation, and systematic debugging.

bundles.name: Mobile Kit
bundles.description: Mobile development essentials — mobile-first design doctrine and Capacitor hybrid app best practices.

bundles.name: Meta Kit
bundles.description: Archon power tools — skill discovery, authoring, packaging, prompt engineering, and the skills index.

synapses.name: metacognition
synapses.description: Structured self-awareness for agents — plan before acting, monitor confidence during execution, reflect on quality after completion

firingPhases.name: PLAN
firingPhases.description: Assess complexity, inventory knowledge, select strategy, define exit criteria

firingPhases.name: MONITOR
firingPhases.description: Tag confidence on decisions, check progress, detect stuck loops, track assumptions

firingPhases.name: REFLECT
firingPhases.description: Self-score quality, capture lessons learned, disclose known gaps and uncertainties
